ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Dec-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Joy for Stephen Hom (Petitioner).

Mr. Joy stated that the related trust litigation is in settlement negotiations, that he served a notice to creditors, that Pure Entertainment has filed a claim for $3,547,000.00, that he is concerned about this turning into a full blown trial and that he can get the inventory and appraisal to the Referee next week. The Court instructed Mr. Joy to also file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to December 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Continued To Dec-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Joy for Stephen Hom (Administrator).

Mr. Joy stated that there is a consuming litigation in the related Trust action, that Vlad Cood has sued the Attorney in the litigation matter and the Attorney in the unlawful detainer action, and that Mr. Cood has threatened to sue him as well. Mr. Joy also stated that he believes there is a tentative settlement in the Trust matter, that he does not want to encourage another lawsuit and reduce the chances of the settlement, that the litigation matter is approaching the five year statute of limitations, that the Trust is not before the Court and requested a two month continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to December 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
